subject: Fermi GBM triggers 736668287/240506253 and 736669277/240506265 are not GRBs
body:
R. Hamburg (CNRS/IN2P3/IJCLab) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) triggers 736668287/240506253 occurring 
at 06:04:42.72 UT and 736669277/240506265 occurring at 06:21:12.28 UT on 06 May 2024, 
tentatively classified as GRBs, are in fact not due to GRBs. These triggers are due to solar flares."
